---
title: "DEG to chr locations"
output: html_notebook
---
Annotating genes to chr locations
Date:07.04.2026

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

#using MAGMA gene locations in hg19 for annotation 
gene_loc <- fread("~/tools/magma/required_files/NCBI37.3.gene.loc", col.names = c("NCBI", "chr", "start", "end", "dir", "SYMBOL"))

annotate_loc <- function(df_comp,prefix,ncbi){
  
  gene_loc <- ncbi
  
  df_name <- paste0(prefix, df_comp, ".txt")
  df <- fread(df_name, col.names = c("Gene", "baseMean", "log2FoldChange", "lfcSE", "stat", "pvalue", "padj"))
  
  gene_loc_filtered <- gene_loc %>% filter (SYMBOL %in% df$Gene)
  
  df_annotated <- merge(df, gene_loc_filtered, by.x="Gene", by.y = "SYMBOL")
  
  df_annotated$extended_start
  
  #based on Finucane paper add +/- 100kb either side around gene body
  df_annotated <- df_annotated %>%
    mutate(
      start_ext = start - 100000,
      end_ext   = end + 100000
    )
  
  bed <- df_annotated %>%
    transmute(chr2 = paste0("chr",chr), start_ext = start_ext, end_ext = end_ext) 

  
  fwrite(bed,
            file = paste0(prefix, df_comp, ".bed"),
            sep = "\t",
            row.names = FALSE,
            col.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
}

annotate_loc(df_comp = "test" , ncbi = gene_loc, prefix= "down_padj_")

```

#sort bed files in bash
```{bash, eval = False}
for f in *.bed; do
  sort -k1,1 -k2,2n "$f" > "${f%.bed}.sorted.bed"
done
```

GWAS have been already processed to LDSC format using Mungesumstats with this pipeline https://github.com/jaenice94/prscs/tree/main/GWAS_standardisation, LDSC additionally performs some formatting with mungestats.py
